message.content:
**Title (Titolo):** Christian Dior Medium Dior Book Tote Bag - Grey Toile de Jouy Embroidery
**Subtitle (Sottotitolo):** Authentic Pre-Owned Dior Book Tote with Minimal Use
**Short Description (Breve Descrizione):** This pre-owned Christian Dior Medium Dior Book Tote bag features a grey Toile de Jouy embroidery and has been used only 1-2 times. It is a spacious and artistic tote that embodies the signature Dior savoir-faire.

**Description (Descrizione):**
The Dior Book Tote, as envisioned by Maria Grazia Chiuri, has become an essential item in the Dior aesthetic. This medium tote is fully embroidered with a grey Toile de Jouy motif and adorned with the 'CHRISTIAN DIOR PARIS' signature on the front. It is designed to hold all daily essentials and can be carried by hand or worn over the shoulder. The bag includes a dust bag and is made in Italy. Its dimensions are 36 x 27.5 x 16.5 cm / 14 x 11 x 6.5 inches, making it suitable for carrying essentials such as a phone, card holder, and lipstick.
